Author: Akari
Name: Housing Lotto Tracker
Punchline: Track your housing lottery bids: plot, world, entry number, results date, win/loss.
Description:
Passively records your housing lottery bids, per character.

Two ways a bid is recorded:
- Automatically when you place it: the in-game entry confirmation is read at bid time (character, world, district, ward, plot, size, your lottery number, and exact results date).
- For bids placed before installing: open Duty > Timers > Estate > Housing Lottery Status to record the entry, then open that plot's placard to fill in the precise results date. (Opening a placard alone never creates a row, so browsing for-sale plots won't clutter the list.)

You can also add a bid fully by hand with the Add bid button.

- One row per bid: character (with world), region, district, ward, plot, plot size, FC-vs-personal, entry date, results date with live countdown, and outcome (Pending / Won / Lost). Optional named Account column for multi-account play.
- Win detection: when a results placard congratulates you, the bid is flipped to Won automatically.
- Sortable table with click-to-expand details, per-column visibility toggles and reordering, editable notes, and optional shared storage across all clients.

Open with /hlt (alias /lotto).
